objectSets.name: First Pass - Upsert Accounts and Channel Programs

objects.query: SELECT Id, Industry, Name, Phone, Type, BillingCity, BillingCountry, BillingState FROM Account WHERE Type = 'Partner' ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Category, Description, Id, IsActive, Name FROM ChannelProgram ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT BenefitsInformation, Description, Id, Name, Program.Name, ProgramId, Rank, RLM_Deal_Expiration_Days__c, RLM_Discount_Rate__c, RLM_Minimum_Deal_Size__c FROM ChannelProgramLevel ORDER BY Program.Name ASC, Rank ASC

objectSets.name: Second Pass - Enable Partner Accounts and Link Members

objects.query: SELECT Id, IsPartner, Name FROM Account WHERE Type = 'Partner' ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT RLM_Adjustment_Type__c, RLM_Adjustment_Value__c, RLM_Discount_Rate__c, Id, Level.Name, LevelId, Name, Partner.Name, PartnerId, Program.Name, ProgramId FROM ChannelProgramMember ORDER BY Program.Name ASC, Partner.Name ASC
